title: VeriSoftBench: Repository-Scale Formal Verification Benchmarks for Lean
reason_to_include: Open 500-obligation software-verification benchmark from UT Austin formal-methods researchers；结果由 Lean 4 type checker on repository-context proof obligations 判定。
decision_reason: 主来源、发布日期与程序化验证契约均已在候选审计中核对。
review_note: L4 内容已完成，仍等待人工 L5 决策。
